typecheck.summary: TypeScript completed without errors after adding match result score/stat consistency checks and final confirmation UI.

lint.summary: ESLint passed without warnings for the updated result modal, match result service, and regression tests.

targetedResultTests.summary: Focused result tests passed: 68 tests passed, covering backend rejection before transactions, frontend inconsistent stat blocking, and final confirmation before save.

localSupabaseApi.summary: Local Supabase reset, QA auth seed, demo seed, and real API tests passed: 15 tests passed, covering the match result API path after service validation changes.

browserRuntime.command: Retried Browser against existing http://localhost:3000/ tab after local Supabase reset
browserRuntime.summary: Logged in with the local QA admin account, opened Schedule, confirmed the result action is visible for the ready past match, verified inconsistent Red goals show the score/stat toast without opening confirmation, then verified valid score opens the final confirmation warning without submitting.

baseline.summary: Harness validation, lint, typecheck, and full Vitest suite passed: 19 test files passed, 1 skipped; 219 tests passed, 15 skipped.

issuesObserved: Match result payloads could submit player goal or assist totals higher than the corresponding team score.
The result modal sent the save request immediately without a final single-shot confirmation.
The MOM API proposal was intentionally deferred because it needs separate policy decisions for is_mom records, point ledger idempotency, and records aggregation.
harnessImprovementProposal: No harness promotion proposed; the new risks are covered by service and UI regression tests.
retrospective.reason: This is product validation and confirmation behavior rather than a reusable harness rule.
